title: Iran Dismisses Trump's 48-Hour Peace Ultimatum As 'Unbalanced And Stupid' Amid Escalating West Asia Conflict
description: Iran's central military command has dismissed US President Donald Trump's 48-hour ultimatum to reach a peace deal or reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with General Ali Abdollahi Aliabadi characterising the American president's threat as a "helpless, nervous, unbalanced and stupid action". The defiant rejection came after Trump posted on Truth Social that Iran faces "all Hell" if it fails to comply by Monday, 6 April.The ultimatum centres on the strategic Strait of Hormuz shipping
